ogTitle: Cooroy Mountain vs Coorparoo: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooroy Mountain and Coorparoo.
heading: Cooroy Mountain vs Coorparoo — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooroy Mountain, Queensland and Coorparoo, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cooroy Mountain has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Coorparoo (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooroy Mountain or Coorparoo safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooroy Mountain has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Coorparoo scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooroy Mountain scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Coorparoo scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooroy Mountain or Coorparoo?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cooroy Mountain has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
